main.description: A user's News feed preferences: the topics and regions they selected and the news sources they opted out of. Stored as a singleton at rkey 'self'.

topics.description: Topic ids the user selected (e.g. 'politics', 'tech'). 'all' disables topic filtering.

regions.description: Region ids the user selected (e.g. 'global', 'uk'). Empty means no region filter.

excludedDids.description: DIDs of curated sources the user opted out of.
